n: The City: The Strategist and the Swan-knight

steps.t: Bruidis has asked you to <rgb=#00FF00>appraise</rgb> the defences of the barracks, and the eastern and western ends of the bridge that spa…
Bruidis is located by the south-eastern gate in the Fleet-fast.
Rossaran is to the north of the Fleet-fast, in the Lower Ward.
